title: Banksia
text: Home * User Interface * Command Line Interface * Banksia Home * Software * Tournament Manager * Banksia Banksia , a Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compliant, lightweight command line interface by Nguyen Pham , suited to run automated engine-engine matches . It is open source, C++11, released under the GPLv3+ license, first published in July 2019 [1] .
